description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

render_findings_list (lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:571-595) emits a flat <ul> with no grouping. On a busy PR (5+ findings of mixed kinds) the reviewer has to mentally bin codes themselves.

Group by leg of the triangle (Spec well-formed / Spec↔Code / Spec↔Tests / Code↔Tests / Coverage / Decisions / Branch), then by severity within each group. Show counts per group as the heading. Reuse the existing tooltip(:severity, sev) mechanism to give each finding code a one-line "what does this mean" hover.

Depends on the triangle-code classifier (child #1) so groups can be derived from the same code-to-leg mapping rather than duplicated.

Tests added (in SpecLedEx.Review.HtmlTest, "render_findings_list — leg + severity grouping" describe block):
- "an empty list renders nothing"
- "leg_for_finding_code reuses the sync-checklist code-to-leg mapping"
- "code_to_leg_lookup is sourced from build_sync_checks (no duplication)"
- "an unknown code falls into the 'Other' bucket"
- "groups appear in the canonical leg order"
- "each group heading shows total count and per-severity counts"
- "within a group, errors render before warnings before info"
- "each finding still uses the tooltip(:severity, sev) mechanism"
- "the heading severity chip also carries the severity tooltip"
- "an unclassifiable code lands in the 'Other' bucket at the end"
- "the outer summary shows the total finding count"
- "groups with no findings do not render"

Verification stubs flipped: none new (stubs that cover spec_review.triage_panel + spec_review.triangle_code_classification were already execute: true).

Summary: Refactored render_findings_list to group findings by triangle leg (Spec well-formed / Spec ↔ Code / Spec ↔ Tests / Code ↔ Tests / Coverage / Decisions / Branch / Other), then by severity within each group. The leg classifier is sourced from build_sync_checks via a new code_to_leg_lookup/0 helper — same source of truth quj.1 added, no duplication. Each group heading shows total count + severity chips; severity tooltip text reuses the existing tooltip(:severity, sev) call. mix test (615 tests, 0 failures) and mix spec.check (0 findings) both clean.

title: Group global findings list by leg + severity
